2026-04-23T06:35:56.7272405Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T06:35:56.7272832Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T06:35:56.7273363Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T06:35:56.7273670Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T06:35:56.7273908Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-23T06:38:54.1584934Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-23T06:38:27.281097566Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58550,\"title\":\"[Provisioning] Migrate Azure.Provisioning.* tests to NUnit 4\",\"body\":\"Migrates all ``Azure.Provisioning.*.Tests`` projects off the NUnit 3 baseline to the repo-default NUnit 4.4.0 + NUnit3TestAdapter 4.6.0.\\n\\n### What changed\\n\\nNUnit 4 removed the classic assertion model (``Assert.IsTrue``, ``Assert.IsNotNull``, ``Assert.AreEqual``, ``Assert.Zero``, ``Assert.IsEmpty``, ``StringAssert.Contains``, etc.). Rewrote those call sites in the shared test sources consumed by every provisioning test project, plus the one in-tree provisioning test that used them directly, to the constraint-model form ``Assert.That(actual, Is.EqualTo(expected))`` / ``Is.Not.Null`` / ``Is.Zero`` / ``Is.Empty`` / ``Does.Contain`` / ``Does.EndWith``:\\n\\n- ``common/ProvisioningTestShared/Trycep.cs`` (auto-included into every ``Azure.Provisioning.*.Tests``)\\n- ``common/ManagementTestShared/Redesign/InheritanceCheckTests.cs`` (auto-included into every ``IsMgmtLibrary`` test project)\\n- ``common/ManagementTestShared/Redesign/ManagementMockingPatternTests.cs`` (same)\\n- ``sdk/provisioning/Azure.Provisioning.Deployment/tests/ExtensionTests.cs``\\n\\nThen removed all 41 ``Azure.Provisioning.*.Tests`` (and ``Azure.Provisioning.Tests``) entries from ``eng/centralpackagemanagement/Directory.NUnit3Baseline.Packages.props``.\\n\\n### Impact on non-provisioning projects\\n\\nThe two ``ManagementTestShared/Redesign/*.cs`` files are auto-included into **all** ``Azure.ResourceManager.*.Tests`` projects too, which remain pinned to NUnit 3 by the baseline file. The constraint-model form (``Assert.That(x, Is.EqualTo(y))``) is supported by NUnit 3.14 as well as NUnit 4, so those projects continue to build and run without modification. Verified by building ``Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor.Tests`` locally.\\n\\n### Verification\\n\\nBuilt under NUnit 4:\\n- ``Azure.Provisioning.Deployment.Tests``\\n- ``Azure.Provisioning.Batch.Tests`` (also ``dotnet test`` — 3/3 pass across net8.0/net9.0/net10.0/net462)\\n- ``Azure.Provisioning.Storage.Tests``\\n\\nBuilt under NUnit 3:\\n- ``Azure.ResourceManager.Advisor.Tests``\\n\\n---\\n🤖 arcturus-copilot\",\"state\":\"closed\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/pull/58550\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"ArcturusZhang\",\"id\":10554446,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/ArcturusZhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/10554446?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"labels\":[\"Mgmt\",\"Provisioning\"],\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":0,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":0},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-23T05:18:35Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-23T06:33:57Z\",\"closed_at\":\"2026-04-23T06:33:56Z\",\"closed_by\":\"ArcturusZhang\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

Rewrote those call sites in the shared test sources consumed by every provisioning test project, plus the one in-tree provisioning test that used them directly, to the constraint-model form ``Assert.That(actual, Is.EqualTo(expected))`` / ``Is.Not.Null`` / ``Is.Zero`` / ``Is.Empty`` / ``Does.Contain`` / ``Does.EndWith``:\\n\\n- ``common/ProvisioningTestShared/Trycep.cs`` (auto-included into every ``Azure.Provisioning.*.Tests``)\\n- ``common/ManagementTestShared/Redesign/InheritanceCheckTests.cs`` (auto-included into every ``IsMgmtLibrary`` test project)\\n- ``common/ManagementTestShared/Redesign/ManagementMockingPatternTests.cs`` (same)\\n- ``sdk/provisioning/Azure.Provisioning.Deployment/tests/ExtensionTests.cs``\\n\\nThen removed all 41 ``Azure.Provisioning.*.Tests`` (and ``Azure.Provisioning.Tests``) entries from ``eng/centralpackagemanagement/Directory.NUnit3Baseline.Packages.props``.\\n\\n### Impact on non-provisioning projects\\n\\nThe two ``ManagementTestShared/Redesign/*.cs`` files are auto-included into **all** ``Azure.ResourceManager.*.Tests`` projects too, which remain pinned to NUnit 3 by the baseline file. The constraint-model form (``Assert.That(x, Is.EqualTo(y))``) is supported by NUnit 3.14 as well as NUnit 4, so those projects continue to build and run without modification.
